attributes.description: Dashboard providing statistics about indicators ingested from the Anomali integration

params.markdown:
This dashboard is a health overview related to the Anomali ThreatStream integration.

The dashboard is made to provide general statistics and show the health of the ingestion of indicators from Anomali ThreatStream.  

It shows how many parts has been enabled, the ingestion rates and provides a few filters for drilling down to specific indicator types retrieved from Anomali ThreatStream.

[Integrations Page](/app/integrations/detail/ti_anomali/overview)

panelsJSON.title: Trend of newly created vs modified vs expiring indicators

query.esql:
from logs-*
| limit 10000
| eval days_until_expiry = date_diff("day", now(), anomali.threatstream.expiration_ts)
| where days_until_expiry <= 7 and days_until_expiry >= 0
| stats count = count(anomali.threatstream.expiration_ts)
| rename count as `Indicators Expiring in Next 7 Days`
| keep `Indicators Expiring in Next 7 Days`

from logs-*
| limit 10000
| eval days_until_expiry = date_diff("day", now(), anomali.threatstream.expiration_ts)
| where days_until_expiry <= 7 and days_until_expiry >= 0
| stats count = count(anomali.threatstream.expiration_ts)
| rename count as `Indicators Expiring in Next 7 Days`
| keep `Indicators Expiring in Next 7 Days`

from logs-*
| limit 10000
| eval days_until_expiry = date_diff("day", now(), anomali.threatstream.expiration_ts)
| where days_until_expiry <= 7 and days_until_expiry >= 0
| stats count = count(anomali.threatstream.expiration_ts)
| rename count as `Indicators Expiring in Next 7 Days`
| keep `Indicators Expiring in Next 7 Days`

from logs-*
| limit 10000
| eval days_since_created = date_diff("day", anomali.threatstream.added_at, now())
| where days_since_created >= 0 and days_since_created <= 7
| stats count = count()
| RENAME count AS `Indicators Created in Last 7 Days` 
| keep `Indicators Created in Last 7 Days`

from logs-*
| limit 10000
| eval days_since_created = date_diff("day", anomali.threatstream.added_at, now())
| where days_since_created >= 0 and days_since_created <= 7
| stats count = count()
| RENAME count AS `Indicators Created in Last 7 Days` 
| keep `Indicators Created in Last 7 Days`

from logs-*
| limit 10000
| eval days_since_created = date_diff("day", anomali.threatstream.added_at, now())
| where days_since_created >= 0 and days_since_created <= 7
| stats count = count()
| RENAME count AS `Indicators Created in Last 7 Days` 
| keep `Indicators Created in Last 7 Days`
